paper_title: LongForm: Effective Instruction Tuning with Reverse Instructions
evaluation_method: Generation quality evaluation across writing tasks (recipe generation, long-form QA, short story generation). METEOR score as primary metric measuring unigram precision/recall with stemming, synonymy, and paraphrase matching. Model generates long-form text from instructions, output compared against reference completions. Dataset: akoksal/LongForm on HuggingFace.
